name: audit
description: A complete pre-ship audit suite for Claude Code: 13 skills covering security (33 OWASP-era vectors), deep code quality, dependency health, regulatory compliance (GDPR/ISO), accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), SEO + GEO, form hardening, responsive design, deploy readiness, and LLM hallucination risk — plus /audit:all to orchestrate them and /audit:diff to compare reports over time.
